chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the deaths per year column, the first interval with more than 100,000 deaths is 1965-1970 with 105,000 deaths. Earlier intervals (1950-1955: 66,000; 1955-1960: 76,000; 1960-1965: 89,000) were below 100,000.

judge_thought: Explanation: The deaths per year for each interval are: 1950–1955: 66,000; 1955–1960: 76,000; 1960–1965: 89,000; 1965–1970: 105,000. The first interval to exceed 100,000 deaths is 1965–1970 with 105,000 deaths.
